revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text: {{distinguish|text=[[Template:*]], which produces an inline bullet •}} {{Documentation subpage}} This template produces an [[asterisk]] for times when typing an asterisk directly would create an [[Help:List|unordered list item]]. == Usage == {{asterisk}} This is text starting with an asterisk. produces: {{asterisk}} This is text starting with an asterisk. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Typing-aid templates]] [[Category:Character-substitution templates]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local/ILL link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text: {{distinguish|text=[[Template:*]], which produces an inline bullet •}} {{Documentation subpage}} This template produces an [[:en:Asterisk|Asterisk]] for times when typing an asterisk directly would create an [[Help:List|unordered list item]]. == Usage == {{asterisk}} This is text starting with an asterisk. produces: {{asterisk}} This is text starting with an asterisk. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Typing-aid templates]] [[Category:Character-substitution templates]] }}

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text: {{distinguish|text=[[Template:*]], which produces an inline bullet •}} {{Documentation subpage}} This template produces an [[:en:Asterisk|Asterisk]] for times when typing an asterisk directly would create an [[Help:List|unordered list item]]. == Usage == {{asterisk}} This is text starting with an asterisk. produces: {{asterisk}} This is text starting with an asterisk. {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Typing-aid templates]] [[Category:Character-substitution templates]] }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Asterisk%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
